ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that generated the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor that generated the reading */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* Acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "acc_z" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the X-axis */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the Y-axis */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the Z-axis */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor configuration when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sensor data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "data_flags" TEXT /* Any flags or notes about the data (e.g., out of range, corrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" INTEGER /* Type of the device (e.g., IoT Sensor, Smart Meter) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "last_firmware_update" TEXT /* Date of the last firmware update */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected (e.g., 1Hz, 10Hz) */,
  "data_retention_policy" TEXT /* Policy for data retention (e.g., 30 days, 1 year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "data_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for data transmission (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) */,
  "power_source" TEXT /* Type of power source (e.g., battery, solar) */,
  "max_data_rate" TEXT /* Maximum data rate supported by the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "default_access" TEXT /* Default access level for new users in this role (e.g., read, none) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance activity in hours */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device for which the configuration is set */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was set */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the sensor configuration (e.g., sensitivity, range) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the calibration process */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that changed status */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Old status of the device */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the device */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the status change */,
  "change_initiated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the status change */,
  "change_duration" REAL /* Duration of the status change in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_logs_change_initiated_by FOREIGN KEY ("change_initiated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "data_resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor data */,
  "data_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)
